title: Red's Obsidianite Armor
description: A Simple Mod which adds Glowing Obsidian, Armor and Tools made from it
body:
Hi This my new Mod adds a new Armor and Tools Set in the game.                                           
**OBSIDIANITE ARMOR And TOOLS**                                                                              
For Recipes and Comparison Please See the Gallery Section.

![Content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a41f07e6453ffa8d4aa6c409e6f7bcf329de2ce.png)

This Set is an Upgraded version if Netherite Set. It has double the Stats of Netherite Set Means double the Protection, double the Durability and Double the Mining Efficiency of Tools.  Armor is compatible with Trims BTW. **ONE THING I FORGOT TO MENTION THIS ARMOR ALSO MAKES PIGLINS NEUTRAL LIKE GOLD ARMOR.**

![Trim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04b2c0f96e881728261deae2be5af07e38774009.png)
